_comment: Edge-case group registry for isolated candidate accuracy. Runtime statuses come from variant accuracy gate files (out/asmlab/gates/candidates/). status fields here are schema defaults only. Simple std::powf probes wired via candidate_edge_case_inputs.json for powf_impl except rounding_sensitive and ziv_retry_path. Rigorous MPFR is not_wired.

integer_exponent.description: Integer exponent inputs inside or near fast-path bounds.

negative_base_integer_exponent.description: Negative base with integer exponent, sign flip and sign_bits.

negative_base_noninteger_exponent.description: Negative base with non-integer exponent, domain error path.

zero_signed_zero.description: Zero and signed-zero base and exponent combinations.

nan_inf.description: NaN and infinity propagation and specials.

subnormal.description: Denormal inputs and normalization exponent adjustment.

overflow_boundary.description: Results near overflow and ERANGE behavior.

underflow_boundary.description: Results near underflow and ERANGE behavior.

rounding_sensitive.description: Cases sensitive to rounding mode when applicable.

known_worst_ulp.description: Documented worst-ULP replay corpus for powf.

ziv_retry_path.description: Ziv accuracy test failure and powf_double_double retry path.
